crisis: International displacement from Syria to Jordan

tavily.answer: As of August 7, 2026, Jordan has resumed travel operations following the easing of travel advisories due to the conflict in the Middle East. G Adventures announced the resumption of Jordan departures starting August 1, 2026, after a three-month pause. The US State Department has issued warnings about growing security risks in the historic region, urging Americans to monitor developments closely. Meanwhile, the conflict in the Middle East continues to affect neighboring countries, with Syria experiencing new economic opportunities due to the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, and Israeli troops facing resistance in southern Syria.
